author: iLIKEmusicANDsound
title: No WI-GI needed
content: I am very happy that I don’t need wi-fi to hear music and that I can upload any song I want.

author: orealis
title: recursive search?
content: seems like I can only search subfolder if the parent folder is set to be available offline... any way to at least get the option to do it anywhere?

author: herald hilly
title: WORST UPDATE
content: new update is TERRIBLE. i can’t even add anything to playlists now!

author: R-in-Norway
title: Great when making own music
content: After testing the free version, I bought the pro version - good value for money! I am working on my 6th album. I upload my songs to the app and can listen through them and rearrange them as I please to get them in the right order before finally releasing them. Very practical, saves me a lot of time and trouble. The support people are also usually quick to reply to any enquiries I’ve made.

author: ingeborgtj
title: En veldig god app
content:
En veldig god app, som lar deg kombinere lokale lydbøker og streaming av musikk. Gratis versjon fungerer lenge, når du skal lytte. AirPlay fungerer på gratis versjon.

NB! Endte opp med å kjøpe PRO versjon fordi offline ikke er inkludert. Så lenge du er online, fungerer gratis versjonen fint.

author: Pengerel
title: Does its job
content: Free, usable, and easy to use. Only drawback is that the eq controlls as are a bit unresposive and dont allways react imidialty

author: Loco__
title: Great musicplayer
content: I have been looking for a musicplayer for my owncloud music and this is the best I found. Great player.

author: acecreamu
title: The only usable offline player on iOS
content: No ads, no garbage, just sync you files and folders and play them as you like. Haven't seen anything better so far. 5/5

author: Wffhsavve
title: Needs less ads
content: Also they spam me to rate it all the time so 1 star

author: Alexrukov
title: Very good cloud player
content: A very good cloud player. Works as it should. Just functionality you need, no extra rubbish. Support Russian titles and tags. Very satisfied. Worth purchasing.
